title: lobularia canariensis subsp. fruticosa
intro: Lobularia canariensis subsp. fruticosa, also known as Canary Island Sweet Alyssum, is a flowering plant species native to the Canary Islands. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Lobularia canariensis subsp. fruticosa include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a natural antibacterial agent. Lobularia canariensis subsp. fruticosa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
